title: Traditional Japanese Sumi e Warrior Poster AI
sourceTitle: Traditional Japanese Sumi e Warrior Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Traditional Japanese sumi-e ink warrior poster featuring lone samurai warrior in tattered dark armor with topknot hair and torn headband. Subject: lone samurai warrior in tattered dark armor with topknot hair and torn headband is shown from behind or three-quarter back view, with katana sheathed at waist and naginata spear carried on the back, torn headband or flowing cloak, and a solitary disciplined presence. Scene: Minimal white paper field with expressive black ink wash, dynamic brush strokes, ink splatters, clean negative space, dramatic shadows, and subtle ethereal atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical composition: lone warrior centered or slightly offset, back view dominant, weapons readable, cloak and armor shapes driven by brush movement, large clean white-paper negative space, and small red seal placed with restraint. Signature Elements: lone samurai warrior in tattered dark armor with topknot hair and torn headband, katana sheathed at waist and naginata spear carried on the back, black ink splashes, clean white paper, flowing cloak, topknot or torn headband, red hanko seal red hanko seal, character 侍, vertical negative space, and traditional sumi-e warrior mood. Style: Traditional Japanese sumi-e ink painting with black ink on white paper, expressive brushwork, minimalistic elegance, high-detail paper texture, and dramatic ink-shadow control. Color Palette: Black ink and white paper only, with a single restrained red hanko seal accent from red hanko seal, character 侍. Lighting: Ink-wash dramatic shadowing implied through brush density, paper texture, and negative space rather than photographic light. Camera: Vertical poster view with clear warrior silhouette, readable back-view posture, and enough emptiness for sumi-e atmosphere. Materials: Ink wash, dry brush strokes, splattered ink, textured rice paper, tattered armor shapes, flowing cloak ink masses, katana linework, spear or naginata silhouette, and red seal ink. Typography: red hanko seal, character 侍 appears as the only red stamp or kanji mark; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Color Palette: Black ink and white paper only, with a single restrained red hanko seal accent from red hanko seal, character 守.
